name: Demo: Rx Demo K3s Registry Preflight
description: Validate the rx-demo image distribution path after the shared registry is online: registry reachability, k3s registry trust, app-scoped image build/push, and registry catalog validation.
notes: Runnable demo lane for the video. Use this after Demo: Swarm Image Registry to prove rx-demo can publish an app-scoped image tag into the local registry.
